name: cookiedclaw
description: Telegram bridge for Claude Code — DM your CC session, get live tool progress, permission relay, and image dispatch back in chat.

plugins.name: cookiedclaw
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin that turns any Telegram chat into a frontend for your CC session. Live tool progress, MarkdownV2 replies, permission relay with inline buttons, image and file dispatch both ways, pairing flow, persistent identity workspace.
